overview.description: The fundX Investment Conservative ETF (XRLX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target risk asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds that seeks long-term capital appreciation through a conservative portfolio of equity and fixed income securities perceived to be in sync with market leaders. XRLX was launched on Jan 7, 2002 and is issued by FundX.
